LAW AND MOTION, 302, RE: PETITIONER BARBARA VANDERMEER'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ALT WRIT OF MANDATE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING ISSUED FOR THIS MATTER ON OCT-31-2023 INDICATED THAT A HEARING WAS REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF'S PETITION FOR ALT WRIT OF MANDATE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

RE: PETITIONER BARBARA VANDERMEER's Notice of Hearing Re: Petition For Alt Writ Of Mandate.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court's tentative ruling issued for this matter on Oct-31-2023 indicated that a hearing was required. Plaintiff's Petition For Alt Writ Of Mandate is taken off calendar for failure to appear.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
